Class AzureVectorStore.Builder

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.AbstractVectorStoreBuilder<AzureVectorStore.Builder>
org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.azure.AzureVectorStore.Builder
All Implemented Interfaces:
VectorStore.Builder<AzureVectorStore.Builder>
Enclosing class:
AzureVectorStore
public static class AzureVectorStore.Builder extends AbstractVectorStoreBuilder<AzureVectorStore.Builder>
Builder class for creating AzureVectorStore instances.

Provides a fluent API for configuring all aspects of the Azure vector store.

Since:
1.0.0
Author:
Greg Meyer, Xiangyang Yu, Christian Tzolov, Josh Long, Thomas Vitale, Soby Chacko, Jinwoo Lee, Alexandros Pappas, chabinhwang

    Description

    Builds and returns a new VectorStore instance with the configured settings.

    Sets the default similarity threshold for returned documents.

  • Method Details

    • initializeSchema

      public AzureVectorStore.Builder initializeSchema(boolean initializeSchema)
      Sets whether to initialize the schema.
      Parameters:
      initializeSchema - true to initialize schema, false otherwise
      Returns:
      the builder instance

    • filterMetadataFields

      public AzureVectorStore.Builder filterMetadataFields(List<AzureVectorStore.MetadataField> filterMetadataFields)
      Sets the metadata fields for filtering.
      Parameters:
      filterMetadataFields - the list of metadata fields
      Returns:
      the builder instance

    • indexName

      public AzureVectorStore.Builder indexName(String indexName)
      Sets the index name for the Azure Vector Store.
      Parameters:
      indexName - the name of the index to use
      Returns:
      the builder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if indexName is null or empty

    • defaultTopK

      public AzureVectorStore.Builder defaultTopK(int defaultTopK)
      Sets the default maximum number of similar documents to return.
      Parameters:
      defaultTopK - the maximum number of documents
      Returns:
      the builder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if defaultTopK is negative

    • defaultSimilarityThreshold

      public AzureVectorStore.Builder defaultSimilarityThreshold(Double defaultSimilarityThreshold)
      Sets the default similarity threshold for returned documents.
      Parameters:
      defaultSimilarityThreshold - the similarity threshold (must be between 0.0 and 1.0)
      Returns:
      the builder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if defaultSimilarityThreshold is not between 0.0 and 1.0

    • contentFieldName

      public AzureVectorStore.Builder contentFieldName(@Nullable String contentFieldName)
      Sets the content field name in the Azure Search index.
      Parameters:
      contentFieldName - the name of the content field (defaults to "content")
      Returns:
      the builder instance

    • embeddingFieldName

      public AzureVectorStore.Builder embeddingFieldName(@Nullable String embeddingFieldName)
      Sets the embedding field name in the Azure Search index.
      Parameters:
      embeddingFieldName - the name of the embedding field (defaults to "embedding")
      Returns:
      the builder instance

    • metadataFieldName

      public AzureVectorStore.Builder metadataFieldName(@Nullable String metadataFieldName)
      Sets the metadata field name in the Azure Search index.
      Parameters:
      metadataFieldName - the name of the metadata field (defaults to "metadata")
      Returns:
      the builder instance

    • build

      public AzureVectorStore build()
      Description copied from interface: VectorStore.Builder
      Builds and returns a new VectorStore instance with the configured settings.
      Returns:
      a new VectorStore instance
